title: Annual Compliance Training
description: Tracks employee completion of mandatory annual compliance training modules.

title: Content Publishing
description: Coordinates the review, approval, and publishing of new website content.

title: Customer Escalation Handling
description: Defines steps for handling and resolving escalated customer issues.

title: Customer Feedback Collection
description: Collects and organizes customer feedback from multiple channels for analysis.

title: Expense Reimbursement
description: Automates employee expense submission, approval, and reimbursement processes.

title: Invoice Approval
description: Routes invoices to the appropriate managers for review and approval before payment.

title: IT Support Ticketing
description: Manages IT support requests from submission to resolution, including escalation steps.

title: Marketing Campaign Launch
description: Manages the planning, approval, and launch of marketing campaigns across channels.

title: Onboarding New Employees
description: Automates the process of onboarding new hires, including document collection, account setup, and training assignments.

title: Procurement Request
description: Manages the submission, approval, and tracking of procurement requests.

title: Project Kickoff
description: Outlines steps for initiating new projects, including team assignments and resource allocation.

title: Quarterly Performance Review
description: Schedules and tracks quarterly employee performance reviews and feedback sessions.

title: Remote Access Request
description: Automates approval and provisioning of remote access for employees and contractors.

title: Vendor Onboarding
description: Guides new vendors through compliance checks, contract signing, and system setup.

title: Weekly Sales Report
description: Generates and distributes weekly sales performance reports to the management team.
